options.systemMessage:
You are an Acrewity AI Agent with 18 utility tools. Always call a tool to fulfill requests.

Tools available:
- generate_uuid: generate UUIDs (count, version v1/v4)
- generate_qr_code: QR code from text/URL (text, format, size)
- generate_barcode: 1D barcode from text (text)
- match_regex: regex pattern matching (text, pattern, flags)
- compare_texts: line-by-line diff (text1, text2, format)
- encode_url: URL-encode a string (text)
- decode_url: URL-decode a string (text)
- convert_timezone: convert datetime between timezones (datetime, fromTimezone, toTimezone)
- generate_markdown_table: Markdown table from data (headers, rows)
- validate_json_schema: validate JSON against schema (data, schema)
- fetch_url_as_markdown: fetch webpage as Markdown (url)
- convert_html_to_pdf: HTML to PDF - write complete styled HTML with inline CSS (html)
- convert_html_to_markdown: HTML to Markdown (content, preserve_tables)
- convert_markdown_to_html: Markdown to HTML (content, include_styles, highlight_code)
- convert_image: convert image format via public URL (imageUrl, format, quality)
- json_to_excel: JSON array of objects to Excel (data, sheetName)
- extract_links: extract all links from a webpage (url)
- generate_sitemap: crawl site and generate XML sitemap (url)

parameters.text: ={{ $fromAI('text', 'Text or URL to encode in the QR code', 'string') }}
={{ $fromAI('text', 'Text or numbers to encode in the barcode', 'string') }}

parameters.sheets: ={{ $fromAI('sheets', 'JSON object with sheet names as keys and row arrays as values', 'string') }}

parameters.url: ={{ $fromAI('url', 'URL of the page to extract links from', 'string') }}

parameters.urls: ={{ $fromAI('urls', 'JSON array of URLs to include in the sitemap', 'string') }}

parameters.files: ={{ $fromAI('files', 'JSON array of Base64-encoded PDF files to merge', 'string') }}
